sql_array: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test; CREATE TABLE test(a UInt32, b Float64, c Float64, d Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT arrayMap(x -> round(x, 3), arrayJoin(covarSampMatrix(a, b, c, d))) AS covarSampMatrix FROM test WHERE (a - 5) > 0;
SELECT a, covarSampMatrix(b, c, (d - 2.0)) AS covarSampMatrix FROM test GROUP BY a HAVING covarSampMatrix > 1.5;
WITH (SELECT AVG(b) AS avg_b FROM test) AS subquery SELECT arrayMap(x -> round(x, 3), arrayJoin(covarSampMatrix(a - avg_b, b, c))) AS covarSampMatrix FROM test WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
WITH (SELECT MAX(d) AS max_d FROM test) AS t1, (SELECT MIN(c) AS min_c FROM test) AS t2 SELECT covarSampMatrix(b, c + t2.min_c, d - t1.max_d) AS covariance FROM test;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_test; CREATE TABLE temp_test(a String, b Float64, c Int32) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO temp_test VALUES ('10', 5.5, -3), ('20', -15.2, 5), ('30', 13.3, 0);
SELECT arrayMap(x -> round(x, 3), arrayJoin(covarSampMatrix(CAST(a AS UInt32), b, c))) AS covarSampMatrix FROM temp_test;
SELECT arrayJoin(covarSampMatrix(b, c, (b - '10.5'))) AS covarSampMatrix FROM test;
SELECT covarSampMatrix(b, c, d) AS mat FROM test WHERE mat[1][1] IS NOT NULL;
